creator: rscheff@freebsd.org
text:
FreeBSD claims compliance with RFC2883 (DSACK) 
https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/login/TransportProtocols/tcp_rfc_compliance

but a recent test on HEAD does not show the transmission of DSACK blocks on deliberatly sent, duplicate data segments.

The bug may exist in older releases already, can not check currently.

tuexen@ may have an update on this too.
